extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož soloed to first career Tour stage win from early breakaway, descending Galibier while FROOM Chris dominated GC rivals with LANDA Mikel support on final climbs.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ survived crash in breakaway then ramped attacks on all climbs, showing unusual strength at sustained high altitude.
MARTIN Dan softened peloton with repeated attacks before BARDET, forcing KWIATKOWSKI to burn himself controlling before finale climbs.
FROOM waited until LANDA appeared exhausted before attacking himself, revealing planned one-two punch with protected climber still fresh.
BARDET Romain multiple accelerations systematically dropped ARU, YATES, MEINTJES before GC contenders responded, exposing altitude sensitivity hierarchy.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: first Tour stage after only five years cycling, showed time trial power on descent and KOM aggression across multiple HC climbs
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: burned out controlling MARTIN Dan attacks early, unavailable when team needed him on final climbs
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: repeated attacks before finale climbs softened field for BARDET, forced Sky to work when LANDA still available
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: appeared exhausted but FROOM still trusted him enough to attack himself, suggesting tactical deception or recovery
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: dropped repeatedly by BARDET accelerations, never returned to front group after multiple attempts at high altitude
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped definitively by BARDET attacks, never saw front again despite white jersey position
rider_signals.MEINTJES Louis: positive: clawed back to group after being dropped, gained time on YATES in white jersey competition
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: only rider able to repeatedly attack at altitude, caught PORTE descending after accelerations dropped three GC contenders
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: attacked after letting LANDA test waters, gained time on all GC rivals while appearing well-hydrated at altitude
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: neutral: finished second on stage but lost 9 seconds to FROOME, now 27 seconds down in GC
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: crashed but rejoined lead group to attack for third on road, securing 49-point KOM lead before final mountain stage
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: inherited green jersey after KITTEL crash abandonment, showing SAGAN-like versatility in late-race strength
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: abandoned after crash despite winning five stages, lost green jersey battle when holding form
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: made courageous attacks on Telegraph/Galibier but caught by stronger riders before finish
